title: QuantumNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-quantum-compute-rs (a pure-Rust state-vector quantum circuit simulator: arbitrary gate circuits with measurement sampling, Grover search, QAOA MaxCut, and a variational quantum eigensolver). The server subscribes to solve requests under the dd-quantum-compute-rs queue group, publishes the simulation result — measurement distribution, amplitudes, and per-mode outputs (amplified item, best bitstring/cut, ground-state energy) — plus runtime events. Payloads carry a quantum.solve.v1 schemaVersion envelope and must not contain secrets.

$dd:nats.summary: Quantum-simulation (circuit / Grover / QAOA / VQE) request/result pipeline.

subjects.name: QuantumSolveRequests
subjects.description: Inbound quantum-simulation requests (a mode plus a circuit, oracle, graph, or Hamiltonian and optional config) consumed by the simulator. Subscribed with the dd-quantum-compute-rs queue group so requests load-balance across replicas. Default for QUANTUM_SOLVE_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.quantum.solve.requests

subjects.name: QuantumSolveResults
subjects.description: Simulation results emitted by the quantum simulator: a measurement distribution and final-state amplitudes plus the per-mode answer (Grover's amplified item and success probability, QAOA's best bitstring and cut value, or the VQE ground-state energy estimate). Carries a quantum.solve.v1 envelope. Default for QUANTUM_SOLVE_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.quantum.solve.results

queueGroups.name: QuantumQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by dd-quantum-compute-rs replicas consuming solve requests.
